channel.title: admin on Hollis Akins
channel.description: Recent content in admin on Hollis Akins

item.description: Hello there! I am an undergraduate student currently studying physics and mathematics at Grinnell College in Grinnell, IA. There I work as mentor at the Data Analysis and Social Inquiry Lab, participate in astrophysics research with the Physics Department, and play an active role in the student Astronomy Group. My primary research interests are in astrophysics and cosmology, and I am pursuing research opportunities in these fields. I am also an avid photographer and enjoy exploring art and design.
